doc_go_summary: Package runtime provides shared process runtime contracts for PCG services. Owns admin HTTP surfaces, metrics endpoints, lifecycle wiring, retry policy defaults, API key checks, and data-store configuration shared by the API, MCP, ingester, reducer, and helper binaries.

types.name: Config
types.desc: Minimal shared process settings: ServiceName, Command, ListenAddr, MetricsAddr

types.name: GraphBackend
types.desc: String type naming the graph database adapter; values GraphBackendNeo4j and GraphBackendNornicDB

types.name: PostgresConfig
types.desc: Shared database and pool tuning for Postgres

types.name: PostgresPoolSetter
types.desc: Interface: SetMaxOpenConns, SetMaxIdleConns, SetConnMaxLifetime, SetConnMaxIdleTime

types.name: Neo4jConfig
types.desc: Shared driver and pool tuning for Neo4j/NornicDB

types.name: AdminCheck
types.desc: func() error for runtime probe health/readiness

types.name: AdminMuxConfig
types.desc: Config for shared admin and probe routes

types.name: HTTPServer
types.desc: One runtime-mounted HTTP server with graceful shutdown

types.name: HTTPServerConfig
types.desc: Addr, Handler, ShutdownTimeout for HTTPServer

types.name: Lifecycle
types.desc: Minimal start-run-stop surface; holds ServiceName and telemetry.Bootstrap

types.name: ContextRunner
types.desc: Blocks until context is canceled; used as default Runner

types.name: Observability
types.desc: Frozen OTEL contract snapshot: MetricDimensions, SpanNames, LogKeys

types.name: RecoveryHandler
types.desc: HTTP endpoints for write-plane recovery: /admin/replay and /admin/refinalize

types.name: RetryPolicyConfig
types.desc: MaxAttempts and RetryDelay for one runtime stage

types.name: StatusAdminOption
types.desc: func(*statusAdminOptions) option type for NewStatusAdminServer

types.name: StatusRequestHandler
types.desc: Manages scan/reindex lifecycle transitions against StatusRequestStore

types.name: StatusRequestStore
types.desc: Interface: RequestScan, ClaimScanRequest, CompleteScanRequest, RequestReindex, ClaimReindexRequest, CompleteReindexRequest, GetScanState, GetReindexState

types.name: RequestState
types.desc: String type: idle, pending, running, completed, failed

types.name: ScanRequest
types.desc: Current scan lifecycle state for one ingester

types.name: ReindexRequest
types.desc: Current reindex lifecycle state for one ingester

functions.name: LoadConfig
functions.desc: Builds validated runtime config from serviceName and env (PCG_LISTEN_ADDR, PCG_METRICS_ADDR)

functions.name: LoadGraphBackend
functions.desc: Reads PCG_GRAPH_BACKEND; empty defaults to nornicdb; invalid values fail at startup

functions.name: LoadPostgresConfig
functions.desc: Reads PCG_FACT_STORE_DSN / PCG_CONTENT_STORE_DSN / PCG_POSTGRES_DSN and pool tuning env

functions.name: LoadNeo4jConfig
functions.desc: Reads PCG_NEO4J_URI/USERNAME/PASSWORD/DATABASE and driver tuning env

functions.name: OpenPostgres
functions.desc: Opens, tunes, and verifies a Postgres connection

functions.name: OpenNeo4jDriver
functions.desc: Opens and verifies a Neo4j/NornicDB Bolt driver with shared pool tuning

functions.name: ConfigurePostgresPool
functions.desc: Applies PostgresConfig pool settings to a PostgresPoolSetter

functions.name: ApplyNeo4jConfig
functions.desc: Applies Neo4jConfig pool settings to a *neo4jconfig.Config

functions.name: NewAdminMux
functions.desc: Builds shared probe and admin route mux: /healthz, /readyz, /admin/status, /metrics

functions.name: NewHTTPServer
functions.desc: Validates and freezes an HTTPServerConfig; Start/Stop implement Lifecycle

functions.name: NewLifecycle
functions.desc: Wraps Config into a Lifecycle with telemetry.Bootstrap validation on Start

functions.name: NewObservability
functions.desc: Snapshots telemetry.MetricDimensionKeys, SpanNames, LogKeys

functions.name: NewRecoveryHandler
functions.desc: Constructs HTTP recovery handler wrapping recovery.Handler

functions.name: NewStatusAdminServer
functions.desc: Builds shared admin HTTPServer using NewStatusAdminMux

functions.name: NewStatusMetricsServer
functions.desc: Builds dedicated metrics HTTPServer for separate MetricsAddr; returns nil when MetricsAddr is empty

functions.name: NewStatusAdminMux
functions.desc: Builds status, metrics, recovery, and optional app routes for a long-running runtime

functions.name: NewStatusMetricsHandler
functions.desc: Prometheus-style text metrics handler from the status reader

functions.name: NewCompositeMetricsHandler
functions.desc: Merges OTEL Prometheus output and hand-rolled runtime gauges at /metrics

functions.name: NewStatusRequestHandler
functions.desc: Constructs StatusRequestHandler with required store

functions.name: ResolveAPIKey
functions.desc: Returns API token: PCG_API_KEY env, then PCG_HOME/.env, then auto-generated if PCG_AUTO_GENERATE_API_KEY is truthy

functions.name: LoadRetryPolicyConfig
functions.desc: Reads PCG_{stagePrefix}_MAX_ATTEMPTS and PCG_{stagePrefix}_RETRY_DELAY; defaults 3 attempts / 30s

functions.name: ConfigureMemoryLimit
functions.desc: Sets GOMEMLIMIT from cgroup memory × 0.70 (min 512 MiB); unconditionally sets GODEBUG=madvdontneed=1

functions.name: WithRecoveryHandler
functions.desc: StatusAdminOption attaching a RecoveryHandler to the admin mux

functions.name: WithPrometheusHandler
functions.desc: StatusAdminOption attaching OTEL Prometheus handler to /metrics

assertions: telemetry services do not start Jaeger/otel-collector in default compose
telemetry overlay defines otel-collector and jaeger with correct env
repository automation does not reference retired compose file names
